h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font, centered at the top of the section with significant leading space.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Used for book titles, publication names, and specific essay titles.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: In-text parenthetical citations including publisher/editor and year.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Lower-case Roman numeral page numbers located in the bottom right corner (e.g., 'ix').
